output_structured_natural_language: whenever explainPath & explain, upon decisionMaking, immediately satisfy justifyDecision

explanation: The robot should explain the path it is planning to take and also explain the reason it is the optimal choice. The structured natural language property is composed of three decisions. Decision 1 states that the robot should explain its intended path while not the robot is not avoiding any obstacles. Decision 2 states that the robot should provide justification when it is in the path planning phase. Finally, decision 3 is to explain why the chosen path is the optimal choice.
decision1_substring: Explain path robot is planning to take
decision2_substring: path robot is planning to take
decision3_substring: why it is the optimal choice
output_structured_natural_language: while explainIntendedPath & !avoidObstacles, upon pathPlanning, immediately satisfy justifyDecision
